title: Section 24
content: Notwithstanding anything contained in section 23, the Central Government may direct 1[any Institute] to-- (a) set up an Endowment Fund and any other Fund for specified purpose; and (b) transfer money from its Fund to Endowment Fund or any other Fund.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 20, ibid., for "the Institute" (w.e.f. 13-1-2020).
